title: Question about the ending of EoE
display_title: Question about the ending of EoE
wikitext:
[]: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by DarkSoul01 » Fri Aug 25, 2017 12:15 am I recently finished EoE and i have a question about the end Can someone explained to me why Asuka's the only one that returns in the end after Shinji refused instrumentality ? Or she's just the first one ? If she's the only one .. It means that Shinji and Asuka are the new Adam and Eve ?

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 25, 2017 12:41 am She's the first - we've been told that anyone can return. It's not clear where people may return, and it's also implied that there was an interval between Shinji's return and Asuka's (rust on the cross from the nail is used as the justification for that - but OTOH Shinji shows little sign of the effects of time). Bagheera's post- EoE story Ghosts of Evangelion (discussion here ) is an example of one which has people returning after an interval and then over a long period (and some not at all).

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by DarkSoul01 » Fri Aug 25, 2017 2:43 am pwhodges wrote: She's the first - we've been told that anyone can return. It's not clear where people may return, and it's also implied that there was an interval between Shinji's return and Asuka's (rust on the cross from the nail is used as the justification for that - but OTOH Shinji shows little sign of the effects of time). Bagheera's post- EoE story Ghosts of Evangelion (discussion here ) is an example of one which has people returning after an interval and then over a long period (and some not at all).

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Fri Aug 25, 2017 2:45 am DarkSoul01 wrote: Is this from director or fan ?

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 25, 2017 4:05 am DarkSoul01 wrote: Is this from director or fan ?

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by Asuka'sBigBrother » Sat Oct 21, 2017 12:16 am DarkSoul01 wrote: If she's the only one .. It means that Shinji and Asuka are the new Adam and Eve ?

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Sun Oct 22, 2017 9:35 am DarkSoul01 wrote: Can someone explained to me why Asuka's the only one that returns in the end after Shinji refused instrumentality ? Or she's just the first one ?

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by Asuka'sBigBrother » Mon Oct 23, 2017 3:22 am really doubt it's meant to be that literal of an Adam and Eve scenario at the end though, as I already said.

[]: Re: Question about the ending of EoE             Quote Post by RamielBestGirl » Tue Oct 31, 2017 10:58 pm Also, C. Other people could come back later, given that there was an interval between Shinji's return and Asuka's. For another in-universe reason it's also entirely possible that Shinji and Asuka are the only people alive on Earth at that moment but that others will come later, even if it's on other continents.
